_provenance: Fetched LIVE from https://kglw.net/api/v2/latest.json on 2026-07-13 (one polite GET, User-Agent + AbortSignal per D-07). This real envelope locks the latest-endpoint schema: rows omit css_class, isrecommended, tracktime, timezone, showtime (docs/SCHEMA.md §11) — the 5 keys whose absence makes rawSetlistRowCensus throw, which latestSetlistRow fixes (05-01 Task 1). It also happens to be a Stu Mackenzie solo set (artist_id 4, docs/SCHEMA.md §9) — a real foreign-band latest row that the artist_id===1 guard (05-01 Task 2) must discard. songname/venuename/shownotes are untrusted editor content, carried verbatim, never rendered (SCHEMA §12).

data.shownotes: Unannounced electronic set on Swanston Street in front of Daiso Japan. This set was filmed with Danny Cohen directing and released as Live from Stop 6 on Stu's YouTube channel "my name stu."
